title: Small documentation tasks still benefit from explicit framing
summary: Even a low-risk README title change becomes easier to explain, validate, and reuse when it passes through the six AletheIA contracts.
evidence: The task stayed understandable from brief to handoff
The context pack remained small without losing clarity
The decision could be explained before execution

actionability.recommended_change: Keep a lightweight six-contract flow available even for simple tasks, with proportional detail.
